'''tabïfyïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dpty|dpty]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-b-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dpty|dpty]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| tabïfyïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || tabïfyïfth || tabïfyïfj || tabïfyïfsh || tabïfyïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || tabïfbïfyïfth || tabïfbïfyïfj || tabïfbïfyïfsh || tabïfbïfyïf
|}

''8 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || tabïfyïfïf || tabïfyïfïf || tabïfyïfïf || tabïfyïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || tabïfyïfth || tabïfyïfj || tabïfyïfsh || tabïfyïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || tabïfyïfïfl || tabïfyïfïfl || tabïfyïfïfl || tabïfyïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || tabïfyïfïfïf || tabïfyïfïfïf || tabïfyïfïfïf || tabïfyïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || tabïfyïfïfn || tabïfyïfïfn || tabïfyïfïfn || tabïfyïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || tabïfyïfïforo || tabïfyïfïforo || tabïfyïfïforo || tabïfyïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|086b4c8}}
